title: Modern TierTagger (Inactive)
description:
This is moderntier's mod, this is no longer operational, as, luctierlist has bought moderntier's, 

- Developer Dan Out.
body:
This mod is the official Modern Tiers Bot which is available for all 1.21+ versions, where you could view your tiers across all of those gamemodes Sword, Crystal, Pot, Nethpot, Mace, UHC, SMP, and Axe.

**Additional Information:**

- This mod allow for people who have been tested on ModernTiers TierList for them to be able to see their tier earned ingame. Which can allow for them to see other people who have tested and there tier directly ingame, as well as othehrs able to see their own.
- This mod also allows you to view other players tier in a custom made GUI, so you could see their tiers, peak tiers, and also their highest tier. This automatically updates after 10 seconds
- It allows you to showcase your own tier ingame from the ModernTiers TierList. As well as It allows you to see other peoples tier from the ModernTiers TierList.

**This is the official discord server invite for ModernTiers: https://discord.gg/moderntiers**
